title: Patient-facing content spec + not-advice template + reading-level rules
context: M3 is the HIGH-risk patient-facing layer and starts only if a partner AND the credentialed pediatric-oncologist + patient-advocate panel are secured. This spec defines education-only scope, the not-advice/not-eligibility-determination template, vetted sourcing, and the BLOCKING sign-off, before any explainer is written. It produces no patient-facing claims itself; it sets the rules and the gate. verifiedNeed stays false until a partner is secured.
objective: Specify the patient-facing content spec: education-only scope, the not-advice/not-eligibility-determination template, reading-level rules, vetted sourcing, and the blocking oncologist + advocate sign-off requirement.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines education-only scope and an explicit not-advice + not-eligibility-determination template applied to every artifact.
Specifies reading-level rules and a plain-language check for all patient-facing content.
Requires sourcing to vetted bodies (NCI/COG/ESMO/CCLG) with citation format.
States the BLOCKING gate: credentialed pediatric oncologist AND patient advocate sign-off (name/credential/date) before anything ships; no exceptions.
Does not start until a partner + expert panel are secured; verifiedNeed remains false.
resources: Vetted bodies: NCI, COG, ESMO, CCLG
